basic_details.job_title: BEL Educational Institutions BEEI Teacher Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 34 Posts
basic_details.short_information: BEL Educational Institutions (BEEI), Jalahalli Post, Bengaluru, has invited applications for 34 Teacher posts across 13 subject categories for the Academic Year 2026-2027, under Advertisement No. BEEI/TS/2026-2027/01 dated 17 June 2026. The posts are purely temporary in nature, based in Bengaluru, and candidates may apply for only one post. Online applications are open from 17 June 2026 to the last date of 07 July 2026 through the official application link.

qualification.details: This section explains the age limit, experience requirement, and subject-wise educational qualification a candidate must meet to apply for BEEI Teachers Recruitment 2026. | Age Limit: The upper age limit for all Teacher posts is 45 years, calculated as on 01 April 2026. | Experience Required: Candidates need a minimum of 3 years of post-qualification teaching experience, as on 01 April 2026. This experience is counted from the month immediately following the month in which the candidate's final examination for the essential educational qualification was completed. | Age Relaxation: Age relaxation up to 50 years is allowed only for applicants who are spouses of deceased BEL employees, on compassionate grounds. | Experience Relaxation: Candidates holding a postgraduate (PG) degree are given preference and receive a relaxation in required experience equal to the duration of their PG degree in years, in cases where PG is not a mandatory qualification for that post. | A graduate degree combined with a relevant postgraduate qualification and B.Ed. is the common pattern across most subjects, with the minimum aggregate percentage ranging from 50% to 55% depending on the post. Candidates with NET, SLET, M.Phil., or Ph.D. are given preference for the Lecturer-level posts in Commerce & Management, Computer Science/IT, and Sanskrit, and similarly for Chemistry and Statistics at the PGT level. | Also Read: PDC Bank Recruitment 2026 Notification Out for 147 Clerk, Officer and More Posts | DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

selection_process: This section explains the stages of selection - from shortlisting through the written test to the final interview.
Candidates are first shortlisted for the Written Test based on the information declared in their application form. Written Test (70% weight): The test carries 50 marks for the respective subject

to be completed in 90 minutes. Interview (30% weight): Conducted only for candidates who qualify in the Written Test. Candidates who pass the Written Test are called for interview based on a 1:5 ratio. The venue for the Written Test and Interview will be intimated only through email. Names of candidates shortlisted for the Written Test
and the final selection list will be notified on the official BEEI website.
Selection for BEEI Teachers Recruitment 2026 follows a three-stage process: shortlisting
and an interview weighted at 30% for those who clear the written test. Only candidates who pass the written test and fall within the 1:5 shortlisting ratio will be interviewed
and all communication about the test venue is sent by email rather than post or phone.
how_to_apply: This section explains the exact steps to submit your online application, along with the key restriction every applicant must keep in mind.
Apply online between 17 June 2026 and 07 July 2026.
Select and apply for only one post - applying for more than one post results in summary rejection of the application.
Enter all personal, educational, and experience details carefully, since no changes are permitted after the application form is submitted.
Keep the 10 interview documents listed above ready in advance.
Applications sent by email or any other channel will not be considered - only the online portal submission is valid.

faq.question: Q1. What is BEEI Teachers Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: It is a recruitment drive by BEL Educational Institutions (BEEI), Jalahalli Post, Bengaluru, for 34 Teacher posts across 13 subject categories on a temporary basis for the Academic Year 2026-2027, under Advertisement No. BEEI/TS/2026-2027/01.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in BEEI Teachers Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 34 vacancies in total, spread across subjects such as English (6), Science (5), Hindi (4), Mathematics (4), Social Science (4), Computer Science PGT (2), Special Educator (2), Librarian (2), and one post each in Chemistry, Sanskrit, Statistics, Commerce & Management, and Computer Science/IT (Lecturer).

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply for BEEI Teachers Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application window opened on 17 June 2026 and closes on 07 July 2026.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for BEEI Teachers Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The upper age limit is 45 years, calculated as on 01 April 2026. Age relaxation up to 50 years is allowed only for spouses of deceased BEL employees, on compassionate grounds.

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum experience required to apply?
faq.answer: Candidates need a minimum of 3 years of post-qualification teaching experience, as on 01 April 2026. PG degree holders may get experience relaxation equal to their PG degree duration, where PG is not mandatory for the post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for BEEI Teachers Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection involves shortlisting, followed by a Written Test (70% weight, 90 minutes) covering subject, general knowledge, and aptitude, and an Interview (30% weight) for candidates who qualify, called in a 1:5 ratio.

faq.question: Q7. Can I apply for more than one post in BEEI Teachers Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No. Candidates are permitted to apply for only one post; applying for more than one post will result in summary rejection of the application.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply online for BEEI Teachers Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through https://jobapply.in/bel2026jalahalliteachers between 17 June 2026 and 07 July 2026. Applications through email or any other channel will not be considered.
